prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年同济大学在上海综合类最低录取位次分别为约3386名、3221名、3741名、3250名、10506名。其中2025年位次异常后移，系当年仅收录了康复物理治 疗和护理学两个特殊专业组数据，不代表同济大学主流专业录取水平。2021–2024年正常位次在3221–3741之间窄幅波动，均值约3400名，2024年基准位次约3250名，整体走势平稳；该校在上海综合类招生计划2021年146人、2022年205人、2023年202人、2024年202人、2025年192人。2026年综合类计划135人、医学类计划56人， 合计191人，较2025年总计划192人基本持平，微降约0.5%，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 同济大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第 18名，稳居全国Top20，近年排名稳定在14–18名区间，学校层次顶尖；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学术不端事件（论文数据存疑、院长被免职等 ），可能对部分考生报考心理产生轻微抑制；抖音热度为较热（总排名第26），短视频平台曝光度中等偏上；2022–2023年曾因土木工程专业分数线暴跌引发广泛关注，但近年影 响逐渐消化；第五轮学科评估A-及以上共17个：土木工程A+、城乡规划学A+、环境科学与工程A+、管理科学与工程A+、交通运输工程A、建筑学A、计算机科学与 技术A等，学科实力顶尖，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信类社会热度持续高热推荐；土木建筑类专业从明显劝退回升至分化观 望，对同济王牌土木建筑类招生构成利好；本省2026年考生总数约66,700人，较2025年49,276人增长约35.4%，竞争显著加剧，是推动位次后移的最主要因素；同济大学位于上海，为本省唯一一所土生土长的顶尖985高校，本地招生占比历来较高，上海考生规模大幅增长对同济录取位次的冲击效应尤为明 显。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2021–2024年正常位次区间约3221–3741名、2026年招生计划基本持平、2026年上海考生总数大幅增长约35.4%以及声誉偏负面等因素，考生规模激增是 推动位次后移的最关键力量，预计2026年最低录取位次约3300名，区间2970–3630名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Tongji University's comprehensive category in Shanghai were approximately 3386, 3221, 3741, 3250, and 10506 respectively. The abnormal shift in 2025 was due to the inclusion of only two special major groups (Rehabilitation Physical Therapy and Nursing) that year, which does not represent the mainstream admission level of Tongji University. Normal rankings from 2021 to 2024 fluctuated narrowly between 3221 and 3741, with an average of about 3400, and a baseline ranking of approximately 3250 in 2024, showing a stable overall trend. The enrollment plan for comprehensive category in Shanghai was 146 in 2021, 205 in 2022, 202 in 2023, 202 in 2024, and 192 in 2025. In 2026, the comprehensive category plan is 135 and the medical category plan is 56, totaling 191, which is essentially flat compared to the total plan of 192 in 2025, a slight decrease of about 0.5%, with limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tongji University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. It ranks 18th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, firmly in the national Top 20, with stable rankings in the 14–18 range in recent years, indicating a top-tier school level. The reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents (questionable paper data, dean dismissal, etc.), which may slightly suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. On Douyin (TikTok), its popularity is relatively high (ranked 26th overall), with moderate to high exposure on short video platforms. From 2022 to 2023, the sharp drop in admission scores for civil engineering majors attracted widespread attention, but the impact has gradually dissipated in recent years. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 17 disciplines rated A- or above: Civil Engineering A+, Urban and Rural Planning A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Management Science and Engineering A+, Transportation Engineering A, Architecture A, Computer Science and Technology A, etc., demonstrating top-tier disciplinary strength, which strongly attracts applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication majors continue to be highly recommended due to social popularity. Civil engineering and architecture majors have shifted from clearly discouraged to a state of differentiation and wait-and-see, which benefits the enrollment of Tongji's flagship civil engineering and architecture majors. In 2026, the total number of candidates in this province is approximately 66,700, an increase of about 35.4% compared to 49,276 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition, which is the main factor driving the ranking shift. Tongji University is located in Shanghai, the only top-tier 985 university native to this province, with a historically high local enrollment proportion. The substantial growth in the number of Shanghai candidates has a particularly pronounced impact on Tongji University's admission rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the normal ranking range of approximately 3221–3741 from 2021 to 2024, the essentially flat enrollment plan for 2026, the significant increase of about 35.4% in the total number of Shanghai candidates in 2026, and the somewhat negative reputation, the surge in candidate numbers is the most critical factor driving the ranking shift. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will be approximately 3300, with a range of 2970–3630.

Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Guohao Elite Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computer and Electronics)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics/Physics/Statistics)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Excellence Plan Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Robotics and Intelligent Manufacturing)
- Economics and Management Experimental Class
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class
- Law
- Accounting
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 2970–3630, it is recommended to primarily fill in Tier 2 majors, use Tier 1 majors as reach options, and Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (<2970), focus on reaching for flagship majors like the Guohao Elite Class and Computer Science. If the ranking is in the middle of the range (around 3300), it is recommended to prioritize new engineering majors such as the Excellence Plan Class and Robotics. If the ranking is near the upper limit of the range (>3630), consider options like the Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class and Law.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 同济大学2022-2025年上海市医学类最低录取位次分别为：2022年11799名（计划56人）、2023年10565名（计划56人）、2024年9624名（计划56人）、2025年10506名（计划56人 ）。2021年数据缺失。四年间位次呈先降后升的V型走势：2022→2023下降1234位（更易进），2023→2024继续下降941位，但2024→2025反弹上升882位，显示医学类报考热度在2025 年明显回升。2026年医学类招生计划仍为56人（康复物理治疗33人、护理学23人），与2025年持平，计划无扩缩变化，供需弹性计算显示计划因素对位次影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 同济大学是教育部直属的全国重点大学，国家985工程、211工程重点建设高校，入选国家双一流建设高校。学校综合实力雄厚，医学相关学科依托学校强大的工科和理科基础， 在上海及长三角地区享有较高声誉。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来全国报考热度持续上升，尤其在上海这样的一线城市，医学类专业因就业前景稳定、社会地位高而备受考生青睐。同济大学医学类在沪仅设康复物理治疗和护 理学两个专业，招生规模较小（56人），竞争较为激烈。2025年位次回升至10506名，反映出医学热度回暖趋势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合以上因素，2026年同济大学上海市医学类最低录取位次预测为10556名，较2025年小幅上升50位（更难进），波动区间为10239-10873名。招生计划持平但医学报考热度持续 ，预计位次将延续2025年的回升趋势，小幅上移。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: Tongji University's minimum admission rankings for Medicine in Shanghai from 2022 to 2025 were: 2022: 11799 (plan 56), 2023: 10565 (plan 56), 2024: 9624 (plan 56), 2025: 10506 (plan 56). 2021 data is missing. Over the four years, rankings showed a V-shaped trend: 2022→2023 dropped by 1234 (easier to enter), 2023→2024 dropped further by 941, but 2024→2025 rebounded by 882, indicating a significant recovery in the popularity of Medicine in 2025. The 2026 enrollment plan for Medicine remains 56 (Rehabilitation Physical Therapy 33, Nursing 23), unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction. Supply-demand elasticity calculations show the plan factor has a neutral impact on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tongji University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university of the national 985 Project and 211 Project, and selected for the national Double First-Class construction university. The university has strong comprehensive strength, and its medical-related disciplines rely on the university's strong engineering and science foundation, enjoying a high reputation in Shanghai and the Yangtze River Delta region.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the national popularity of medical majors has been rising, especially in first-tier cities like Shanghai, where medical majors are favored by candidates due to stable employment prospects and high social status. Tongji University's Medicine in Shanghai only offers two majors: Rehabilitation Physical Therapy and Nursing, with a small enrollment scale (56), making competition relatively intense. The ranking rebounded to 10506 in 2025, reflecting a warming trend in medical popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the above factors, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Tongji University's Medicine in Shanghai in 2026 is 10556, a slight increase of 50 places (harder to enter) compared to 2025, with a fluctuation range of 10239-10873. The enrollment plan remains unchanged, but the popularity of medical applications continues, and the ranking is expected to continue the recovery trend of 2025, moving slightly upward.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Rehabilitation Physical Therapy
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to use Rehabilitation Physical Therapy as a Tier 1 sprint and Nursing as a Tier 3 safety.
